intended_use: This medical device is intended to segment Cardiac chambers as anatomical structures on contrast or non-contrast MR scans of adult patients that undergo Cardiac MR procedures.
intended_use_full: This medical device is intended to segment Cardiac chambers as anatomical structures on contrast or non-contrast MR scans of adult patients that undergo Cardiac MR procedures.
target_condition: cardiac chamber anatomy assessment in adult patients undergoing cardiac MR imaging
ground_truth: Manual segmentation traced by board certified radiologist with experience in cardiac MR reviews, with separate ground truth datasets for Cine-ax and De-ax algorithms
other_metrics: Cine-ax LV Myocardium DICE score: 0.82 (95% CI 0.81-0.83); Cine-ax LV Chamber DICE score: 0.90 (95% CI 0.89-0.91); Cine-ax RV Chamber DICE score: 0.84 (95% CI 0.82-0.85); De-ax LV Myocardium DICE score: 0.79 (95% CI 0.75-0.83); De-ax LV Chamber DICE score: 0.88 (95% CI 0.84-0.92)
